titles.title: On Calvary's Brow My Saviour Died

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: On Calvary’s brow my Saviour died, ‘Twas there my Lord was crucified; ‘Twas on the cross he bled for me, And purchased there my pardon free.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: It was on the cross he shed his blood, It was there he was crucified; But he rose again, and he lives in my heart Where all is peace and perfect love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Oh Calvary, dark Calvary, Where Jesus shed his blood for me. Oh Calvary, dark Calvary: Speak to my heart of Calvary.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: ‘Mid rending rocks and darkening skies, My Saviour bows his head and dies; The opening veil reveals the way To Heaven’s joys and endless day.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Oh Jesus, Lord, how can it be That thou shouldst give thy life for me, To bear the cross and agony In that dread hour on Calvary?
